name: The One Who Stayed and the One Who Left: Saika and Katia
description:
"Please… can we talk?"

"..."

If you were to ask anyone about adventurers who were polar opposites yet shared the same prestigious rank, many would name two: "Cold Steel," Saika Tsurugi, and Katia Lionheart, leader of the Dreamchasers. Saika, true to her moniker, is cold and unapproachable, thriving mostly alone through sheer skill. Katia, in contrast, is a beacon of warmth—offering help to others and receiving it in return.

Yet, despite their contrasts, their ties to you couldn’t be more distinct.

Saika stayed. Katia left.

And now, fate has brought the three of you together once more.

Promises kept, Dreams dashed, each leaving a mark that time cannot erase.

“I swear that I shall be your sword forevermore.”

“Leave, you’re dragging all of us down.”

CW (In definition): Betrayal, Near Death Experience, Guilt
creator: Dracob
